\tzpentry{ID4361}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4361 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathcal{L}_{\text{total}} &= \int_{\mathcal{M}} d^4x \sqrt{-g} \Bigg[ \frac{R-2\Lambda}{16\pi G} - \frac{1}{4}\Tr[F_{\mu\nu}F^{\mu\nu}] \\ &\quad + i\bar{\psi}\gamma^\mu D_\mu\psi - m\bar{\psi}\psi + D_\mu\phi^\dagger D^\mu\phi - V[\phi] \\ &\quad + \lambda_{\TZP}\delta^{(4)}(x-x_{\TZP})\log\left(\frac{\Lambda_{\text{UV}}}{\Lambda_{\text{IR}}}\right) \\ &\quad + \frac{\theta}{32\pi^2}\Tr[F \wedge F] + \kappa\Phi_{\text{integrated}} \cdot \mathcal{I}_{\text{density}} \Bigg] \end{align}
